name: Pawn Plaza
description_short: Rick Harrison's Pawn Plaza is a two-story retail center in Downtown Las Vegas housing the Gold & Silver Pawn Shop (featured on History's Pawn Stars) plus dining and entertainment options.
description_long:
Rick Harrison's Pawn Plaza is a two-story retail center located in Downtown Las Vegas, positioned directly adjacent to the world-famous Gold & Silver Pawn Shop. The Gold & Silver Pawn Shop is the iconic location featured on History Channel's popular television program "Pawn Stars," giving it significant brand recognition and media presence in the pawn industry.

The plaza functions as a mixed-use retail destination rather than a traditional standalone pawn shop. Beyond pawn services at the Gold & Silver Pawn Shop, the facility includes restaurant and entertainment venues such as Rick's Rollin Smoke BBQ & Tavern. This creates a destination shopping and dining experience in the heart of Downtown Las Vegas, rather than a single-service financial location.

What distinguishes Pawn Plaza is its association with the Pawn Stars television franchise and Rick Harrison's personal brand. The facility attracts tourists and fans of the TV show seeking the authentic location and hoping to see Rick Harrison or other personalities like Chumlee. The combination of collateral-based lending services with entertainment and hospitality amenities is uncommon in the pawn shop industry and positions it as a tourist attraction as much as a financial services provider.

For consumers seeking pawn services, this location offers the legitimacy and brand recognition of the Gold & Silver Pawn Shop's media presence, though it functions primarily as a retail destination and entertainment venue rather than a specialized lending operation. Customers should expect typical pawn shop services (collateral loans, merchandise sales, precious metals buying) but in a high-traffic tourist environment rather than a dedicated financial services setting.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Featured on History Channel's "Pawn Stars" television show, providing mainstream media credibility
Located in heart of Downtown Las Vegas with significant foot traffic and visibility
Mixed-use facility offers dining (Rick's Rollin Smoke BBQ & Tavern) alongside pawn services
Opportunity to interact with TV show personalities including Rick Harrison and Chumlee
Two-story retail center provides extensive space and diverse merchandise selection
Established brand recognition through television exposure and popular culture presence
cons: Primary function is tourist attraction rather than dedicated financial services provider, potentially resulting in higher wait times
Limited transparency on website regarding loan terms, interest rates, or typical loan amounts
No online application or remote services information provided; appears to require in-person visits
Website lacks specific details about pawn loan processes, collateral requirements, or lending criteria
Tourist-focused marketing may result in less specialized attention to serious borrowers seeking collateral-based loans
best_for: Tourists visiting Las Vegas seeking the Pawn Stars location and experience
Customers comfortable with walk-in, in-person pawn transactions in a retail environment
Individuals with collectibles, jewelry, or precious metals to sell or pawn
Entertainment seekers combining shopping, dining, and celebrity spotting
diagnosis: Pawn Plaza is best for tourists and casual shoppers visiting Downtown Las Vegas who want the authentic Pawn Stars experience combined with dining and retail. The main caveat is that this is primarily a tourist destination and entertainment venue rather than a specialized lending operation, so serious borrowers seeking straightforward pawn transactions with transparent terms may want to contact the facility directly to understand specific loan processes and rates.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: S Las Vegas Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89101
